creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The "Quality" of package collection for 3.0-SNAPs is known not to be the same 
as for the 2.2-STABLE branches.  It is somewhat assumed that -CURRENT users 
will build from /usr/ports if there are problems with a missing or outdated 
package. 
.
